title: Pneumonia Overview
text: Pneumonia is an acute infection of the lung parenchyma causing cough fever dyspnoea and chest pain.

title: Influenza Overview
text: Influenza is a viral respiratory infection causing fever fatigue cough and systemic illness.

title: Common Cold Overview
text: Common cold is a mild viral infection affecting the upper respiratory tract.

title: Sinusitis Overview
text: Sinusitis is inflammation of sinuses causing facial pain congestion and discharge.

title: Strep Throat Overview
text: Pharyngitis is inflammation of the throat commonly caused by viral or bacterial infection.

title: Laryngitis Overview
text: Laryngitis involves inflammation of the larynx causing hoarseness and voice loss.

title: Bronchitis Overview
text: Bronchitis is inflammation of bronchial tubes leading to cough and mucus production.

title: Bronchiolitis Overview
text: Bronchiolitis is a viral infection affecting infants causing breathing difficulty.

title: COPD Exacerbation Overview
text: COPD exacerbation is worsening of respiratory symptoms requiring treatment.

title: Tuberculosis Overview
text: Tuberculosis is a bacterial infection affecting lungs causing chronic cough and weight loss.
symptoms: chronic cough; night sweats; weight loss

title: COVID-19 Overview
text: COVID-19 is caused by SARS-CoV-2 leading to respiratory illness.

title: Pertussis Overview
text: Pertussis is a highly contagious bacterial infection causing severe coughing fits.

title: RSV Overview
text: RSV is a viral infection causing respiratory illness in children and elderly.

title: Legionnaires Overview
text: Legionnaires disease is a severe pneumonia caused by Legionella bacteria.

title: Aspergillosis Overview
text: Pulmonary aspergillosis is a fungal infection affecting immunocompromised individuals.
